release_review.summary: Patch release: updates Env App Workbench defaults for background regions and text annotations, opens Markdown previews in reading mode by default, and consumes the published floe-webapp background layer defaults contract. No Runtime Service protocol or compatibility window changes.
release_review.same_window_rationale: The release changes only Env App UI defaults and the published floe-webapp UI package versions consumed by the embedded frontend. It does not add or change Runtime Service snapshot fields, sys.ping payload semantics, attach/start contracts, startup reports, Desktop IPC payloads, Workbench layout persistence fields, Env App shell readiness, or SSH bootstrap requirements. The existing protocol version, compatibility epoch, minimum Desktop version, and minimum Runtime version remain valid.
checked_surfaces: Env App Workbench layered canvas modes and dock routing
Env App Workbench default background region fill, opacity, and material
Env App Workbench default text annotation font size
Env App Markdown file preview reading-mode default
Env App Workbench sticky notes, text annotations, and background region persistence
Runtime Workbench layout schema migration and snapshot/event APIs
Workbench projected surface drag, resize, pan, zoom, and theme/mode render transactions
Desktop embedded drag regions during Workbench theme changes
Desktop managed runtime start, attach, and open gating
startup report and local-ui runtime state carriers
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload
Env App desktop first-screen readiness IPC
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap and attach flow
